---
title: "Quiz Interaction"
---

## Overview
The `quiz` interaction generates placeholder quiz scaffolds for multiple choice questions.

## YAML Usage
```yaml
interactions:
  - type: quiz
    variant: quick_check
    question_count: 3
```

## Available Variants
- `quick_check`: Default question count is 3.

## Parameters
- `type`: Must be `quiz`.
- `variant`: The name of the predefined variant.
- `question_count`: (Optional) The number of placeholder questions to generate.

## Generated Scaffold Example
```markdown
## Quick Check

1. [Add question here.]
2. [Add question here.]
3. [Add question here.]
```
